title: 油塘衝突兩名退休警員被捕

replies.msg:
Two retired cops among three detained over ‘Lennon Wall’ clashes

https://www.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/politics/article/3018174/two-retired-policemen-among-three-people-arrested-over

南早專訊

Two retired police officers, along with another man, have been arrested in Hong Kong over assaults on extradition bill protesters at “Lennon Walls” in separate clashes just hours apart.

The Post has learned that two retired policemen, aged 56 and 57, were arrested for assault during a confrontation with demonstrators at the “Lennon Wall” at Yau Tong MTR station near Lei Yue Mun on Wednesday night, where more than 200 people gathered at one point.

source:hk01
【逃犯條例】油塘連儂牆衝突 兩退休男被捕 一人為退休警察

昨晚，油塘港鐵站外因有中年男子兩度阻止年輕人設置連儂牆，而爆發衝突。多名中年大漢包圍年輕人，不斷用粗言穢語指罵，大批警員到場維持秩序，至深夜年輕人數目不斷增多，雙方人數逆轉。油塘衝突不斷，在電梯、天橋及大本營平台發生多宗推撞、爭執事故，其中警方接獲四宗有關報案，共拘捕兩名退休男子。據了解，其中一名被捕人士為退休警務人員。

據悉，該兩名被捕人士涉及以下案件。一名退休男子聲稱有人阻擋其妻子前進，並推撞她，男子便「還手」推撞該名市民，該名男子其後被捕。另一名退休男與兩名朋友站在一旁，一名廚師途徑此處欲路過不果，被三名男子擋去路，繼而發生爭執。警方接報到場調停事件，其中一名退休人士承認曾經推撞廚師被警方拘捕。[size=5]廚師決定不追究事件[/size=6]，警方則表示會查看閉路電視片段再決定下一步行動。

Two retired cops among three detained over ‘Lennon Wall’ clashes

https://www.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/politics/article/3018174/two-retired-policemen-among-three-people-arrested-over

南早專訊

Two retired police officers, along with another man, have been arrested in Hong Kong over assaults on extradition bill protesters at “Lennon Walls” in separate clashes just hours apart.

The Post has learned that two retired policemen, aged 56 and 57, were arrested for assault during a confrontation with demonstrators at the “Lennon Wall” at Yau Tong MTR station near Lei Yue Mun on Wednesday night, where more than 200 people gathered at one point.
